name: well-architected review: the security pillar includes the DoD SCCA and NIST zero-trust sources
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/well-architected-review.sh" --workload "resilient multi-region platform" --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));const s=j.pillars.find(p=>p.pillar==="security").grounding_sources;process.exit(s.includes("dod-scca")&&s.includes("nist-zero-trust")?0:1)' && echo gov-grounded 1>&2
